## Checklist

- [ ] PR is opened from a team fork into this repo's `main`.
- [ ] At least two Skills in this PR.
- [ ] Each Skill walked through [docs/skill-checklist.md](../docs/skill-checklist.md).
- [ ] `python scripts/validate.py` passes locally.
- [ ] CI is green.
- [ ] No real personal data anywhere in the diff.
- [ ] Single PR for the whole team.
